meta.title: Google Ads Management | dolasads
meta.description: Professional Google Ads campaign management. From keyword research to conversion optimization.

google-ads.heroSubtitle: Campaigns that deliver results, not just clicks.

sections.heading: How I approach Google Ads campaigns
sections.content: I set up every campaign from scratch with a focus on conversions. Detailed keyword analysis, creating ads that attract the right clients, and continuous optimization of every campaign.

sections.heading: What you get
sections.content: Complete Google Ads account setup, keyword research, ad creation and testing, conversion tracking, monthly reports, and constant optimization for maximum return on investment.

meta.title: Website Development | dolasads
meta.description: Modern, fast, responsive website optimized for conversions. Design that turns visitors into clients.

izrada-sajtova.heroSubtitle: A website that works for you 24/7.

sections.heading: Websites that convert
sections.content: I don't just build pretty websites. I build websites with a clear goal: to turn visitors into clients. Every element is carefully considered, from structure to calls to action.

sections.heading: Technology and performance
sections.content: I use modern technologies for fast, responsive websites that rank well on Google. Mobile display is a priority since most visits come from phones.

features: SEO foundation built from the start
Contact forms and calls to action
Modern design tailored to your business

meta.title: SEO Optimization | dolasads
meta.description: Technical and content SEO that increases your site's organic visibility on Google.

seo-optimizacija.heroSubtitle: Organic growth of visibility on Google.

sections.heading: Technical and content SEO
sections.content: I perform complete technical optimization of your site and create a content strategy that attracts organic traffic. The goal is long term visibility without paid ads.

sections.heading: An approach that delivers results
sections.content: Analysis of current state, research of keywords your target audience searches for, page optimization, and position tracking. Everything measurable and transparent.

meta.title: Site Optimization | dolasads
meta.description: Speed optimization, improved user experience, and Core Web Vitals scores for better ranking.

optimizacija-sajta.heroSubtitle: A faster site means more conversions.

sections.heading: Why speed matters
sections.content: Every second of waiting reduces conversions. I optimize loading speed, user experience, and Core Web Vitals scores that directly affect Google ranking.

sections.heading: What I optimize
sections.content: Analysis of current performance, image and resource optimization, improvement of loading times, mobile experience, and site interactivity.

meta.title: Landing Page Creation | dolasads
meta.description: Landing pages designed for conversions. Every element serves one goal: turning visitors into clients.

landing-stranice.heroSubtitle: Pages that turn clicks into clients.

sections.heading: Focus on conversions
sections.content: A landing page has one goal: for visitors to take action. Every element is designed to lead to that goal, from headline to call to action.

sections.heading: Why you need a landing page
sections.content: When you launch a Google Ads campaign, visitors need to land on a page that convinces them to contact you. A generic page doesn't do that. A landing page does.

features: Design focused on a single conversion

meta.title: Digital Marketing | dolasads
meta.description: Complete digital strategy for your business. Google Ads, SEO, website development, analytics. All in one place.

digitalni-marketing.heroSubtitle: Complete digital strategy for growing your business.

sections.heading: All digital services in one place
sections.content: Digital marketing is not just one channel. It's a strategy that combines website, SEO, paid advertising and analytics into a whole that delivers results. Instead of coordinating multiple people, you get one specialist who covers everything.

sections.heading: An approach that works
sections.content: I start by analyzing your business and target audience. Based on that, I create a strategy that includes the right mix of channels. Every dollar of budget goes where it brings the highest return.

meta.title: Analytics & Tracking | dolasads
meta.description: Google Analytics 4 setup, Google Tag Manager implementation and conversion tracking. Precise data for smart business decisions.

analitika-i-tracking.heroSubtitle: Precise data for smart business decisions.

sections.heading: Why data matters
sections.content: Without tracking data, marketing budget is guesswork. I set up Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager so you know exactly where your clients come from, what they do on your site, and how much each conversion costs.

sections.heading: What I set up
sections.content: Complete GA4 implementation with tracking of all important events on your site. GTM setup for flexible tag management without needing a developer. Conversion tracking for Google Ads, forms, calls and all other actions that matter to your business.

features: Integration with Google Ads for optimization

meta.title: Portfolio | dolasads
meta.description: See real results from my projects. From website creation to Google Ads campaigns with measurable results.

portfolioPage.heading: Portfolio
portfolioPage.intro: My agency work involves managing budgets of over 300,000 EUR per year in Google Ads. I channel that knowledge and experience into local businesses, with the same approach and the same attention to detail.
portfolioPage.agencyDescription: As part of one of the leading marketing agencies in Serbia, I manage Google Ads campaigns for clients across a wide range of industries. That experience with large budgets and demanding clients is applied to every local project as well.

projects.title: Selidbe Beograd
projects.description: Complete digital setup for a local moving company in Belgrade. Website built from scratch and Google Ads campaign launched with a brand new account. This is the best proof that my approach works in real conditions, with a real budget.
features: Google Ads campaign with a new account

projects.title: Different Event
projects.description: An elegant website for an event equipment rental company. Professional design focused on showcasing services and easy contact.
features: Elegant design tailored to the brand

portfolioPage.adsResultsSubheading: Setup from scratch. Brand new Google Ads account. Local business in Belgrade.

meta.title: About | dolasads
meta.description: Nikola Dolaš. Digital marketing specialist with experience in Google Ads, SEO and website development. 4+ years in the industry.

aboutPage.heading: About Me
aboutPage.subheading: Digital marketing specialist with agency experience.
aboutPage.intro: My name is Nikola Dolaš and I specialize in digital marketing with a focus on Google Ads, SEO and website development. Through years of agency work and working with my own clients, I've gained experience that I apply to every project.

experiences.description: Managing digital campaigns, media buying, account management and digital strategy for clients across various industries.
Programmatic advertising, header bidding and optimization of digital advertising revenue.
Campaign management, client communication and optimization of digital advertising performance.

highlights: Managing budgets of 300,000+ EUR per year
From traffic manager to account executive

common.ctaSubheading: Contact me and let's get your project going.
